# pfsense_ipsec_phase2 (Data Source)

Retrieves a single IPsec [Phase 2](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/vpn/ipsec/configure.html) tunnel configuration by unique ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uniq_id` (String) Unique identifier for this phase 2 entry.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether this phase 2 entry is disabled.
- `encryption_algorithm_option` (Attributes List) Encryption algorithm options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--encryption_algorithm_option))
- `hash_algorithm_option` (List of String) Hash algorithm options.
- `ike_id` (String) IKE identifier linking this phase 2 to a phase 1 entry.
- `keepalive` (String) Keepalive setting (enabled/disabled).
- `lifetime` (String) SA lifetime in seconds.
- `local_id` (Attributes) Local network identifier (type, address, netbits). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--local_id))
- `mobile` (Boolean) Whether this is a mobile client phase 2 entry.
- `mode` (String) IPsec mode (tunnel, transport, vti).
- `nat_local_id` (Attributes) NAT/BINAT local network identifier (optional). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nat_local_id))
- `pfs_group` (String) PFS key group number.
- `ping_host` (String) IP address to ping for keepalive.
- `protocol` (String) IPsec protocol (esp, ah).
- `rand_time` (String) Random time range in seconds.
- `rekey_time` (String) Rekey time in seconds.
- `remote_id` (Attributes) Remote network identifier (type, address, netbits). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--remote_id))
- `req_id` (String) Request ID for the phase 2 SA.

<a id="nestedatt--encryption_algorithm_option"></a>
### Nested Schema for `encryption_algorithm_option`

Read-Only:

- `key_length` (String) Key length in bits.
- `name` (String) Algorithm name.


<a id="nestedatt--local_id"></a>
### Nested Schema for `local_id`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) Network address.
- `net_bits` (String) Network prefix length (CIDR bits).
- `type` (String) Network type (address, network, lan, etc.).


<a id="nestedatt--nat_local_id"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nat_local_id`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) Network address.
- `net_bits` (String) Network prefix length (CIDR bits).
- `type` (String) Network type (address, network, lan, etc.).


<a id="nestedatt--remote_id"></a>
### Nested Schema for `remote_id`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) Network address.
- `net_bits` (String) Network prefix length (CIDR bits).
- `type` (String) Network type (address, network, lan, etc.).
